title: Heady Content Provenance Record
description: Tracks source, license, and attribution metadata for all ingested content

source_url.description: Original URL or identifier of the content source

license.description: License under which the content was obtained

ingestion_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when content was ingested

ingested_by.description: Service or pipeline that ingested the content

jurisdiction_notes.description: Notes on jurisdiction-specific restrictions (e.g., PD in US only)

sha256_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the original content for integrity verification
